description: Information returned after the 'DEPLOY_TRANSFER_DISKS' task and passed to 'DEPLOY_TRANSFER_TARGET_RESOURCES' and 'REPLICATE_DISKS'. The only required property is the 'volumes_info', and the provider plugins may freely declare and use any other fields.

items.description: Object with information on the replicated volumes. Provider plugins may add their fields as required.

disk_id.description: String ID of the source disk the replicated volume corresponds to.

volume_dev.description: Guest minion device path (e.g. /dev/disk/by-id/...) when the volume is attached; use "" for rows that do not represent a transferred block dev yet (e.g. shared-disk non-owners).
